description_long: This is a sturdy outdoor bench featuring a frame made of light gray metal and three horizontal wooden slats forming the seat and backrest. The bench has two armrests, one on each side, integrated into the metal frame, providing comfort and support. The wooden slats are weathered, suggesting exposure to outdoor elements, and are attached securely to the frame with visible fasteners. The legs are robust and slightly curved, designed to provide stability on various surfaces. The backrest is slightly angled for ergonomic support, and the overall design is practical and functional for public spaces. The bench's materials and construction indicate it is intended for parks, sidewalks, or other urban outdoor environments.
description: A robust outdoor bench with a gray metal frame and weathered wooden slats, featuring armrests and a supportive backrest. Designed for durability and comfort in public urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved metal frame, armrest, and the alignment of the wooden slats.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the three wooden slats, both armrests, and the full width of the bench.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other armrest and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the wooden slats and the supporting metal frame structure.
attribute_leg_design: curved metal supports integrated with armrests
